record.field: Paperless-ngx is a self-hosted document management system that scans, OCRs, tags and full-text-searches your paper and PDFs into a private digital archive.

Paperless-ngx is a self-hosted document management system that scans, OCRs, tags and full-text-searches your paper and PDFs into a private digital archive.

It turns physical paper, scans and PDFs into a searchable, organized digital archive that you fully own. Every incoming file is run through OCR so its text becomes searchable, then classified with tags, correspondents, document types and storage paths — automatically or with matching rules you define. Documents arrive from a watched consume folder, email fetching, scanner uploads or the mobile apps, and the modern web UI lets you find any invoice, contract or record in seconds. It is the community-driven successor to Paperless and Paperless-ng.

Key features
  • OCR on every incoming scan and PDF, making the full text searchable within seconds
  • Automatic classification with tags, correspondents, document types and storage paths
  • Multiple ingestion paths: a watched consume folder, email fetching and scanner/mobile uploads
  • Fast full-text search with filters, saved views, bulk editing and a clean web interface
  • Office and complex-PDF conversion via the bundled Apache Tika and Gotenberg services
  • Fine-grained users, groups and permissions plus a full REST API for automation
Best for

Individuals, families and businesses that want a paperless office: a private, searchable archive of invoices, contracts and personal records they fully control. Keep it behind HTTPS and never expose the consume folder as a public resource.

services: broker: image: docker.io/library/redis:7-alpine restart: unless-stopped command: --save 60 1 --loglevel warning healthcheck: test: - CMD-SHELL - redis-cli ping | grep PONG start_period: 20s interval: 30s retries: 5 timeout: 3s volumes: - ./redis:/data expose: - 6379 container_name: '{{ INSTANCE_CODE }}_broker' networks: - internal db: image: docker.io/library/postgres:17-alpine restart: unless-stopped healthcheck: test: - CMD-SHELL - pg_isready -d $${POSTGRES_DB} -U $${POSTGRES_USER} start_period: 20s interval: 30s retries: 5 timeout: 5s volumes: - ./database:/var/lib/postgresql/data environment: POSTGRES_DB: {{ pg_db }} POSTGRES_USER: {{ pg_user }} POSTGRES_PASSWORD: {{ pg_pass }} expose: - 5432 container_name: '{{ INSTANCE_CODE }}_db' networks: - internal gotenberg: image: docker.io/gotenberg/gotenberg:8 restart: unless-stopped command: - gotenberg - --chromium-disable-javascript=true - --chromium-allow-list=file:///tmp/.* expose: - 3000 container_name: '{{ INSTANCE_CODE }}_gotenberg' networks: - internal tika: image: docker.io/apache/tika:latest restart: unless-stopped expose: - 9998 container_name: '{{ INSTANCE_CODE }}_tika' networks: - internal webserver: image: ghcr.io/paperless-ngx/paperless-ngx:latest restart: unless-stopped environment: PAPERLESS_REDIS: redis://broker:6379 PAPERLESS_DBHOST: db PAPERLESS_DBNAME: {{ pg_db }} PAPERLESS_DBUSER: {{ pg_user }} PAPERLESS_DBPASS: {{ pg_pass }} PAPERLESS_SECRET_KEY: {{ secret_key }} PAPERLESS_ADMIN_USER: {{ admin_user }} PAPERLESS_ADMIN_PASSWORD: {{ admin_password }} PAPERLESS_ADMIN_MAIL: {{ admin_mail }} PAPERLESS_OCR_LANGUAGE: {{ ocr_language }} PAPERLESS_TIME_ZONE: {{ time_zone }} PAPERLESS_TIKA_ENABLED: 1 PAPERLESS_TIKA_GOTENBERG_ENDPOINT: http://gotenberg:3000 PAPERLESS_TIKA_ENDPOINT: http://tika:9998 volumes: - ./data:/usr/src/paperless/data - ./media:/usr/src/paperless/media - ./export:/usr/src/paperless/export - ./consume:/usr/src/paperless/consume expose: - 8000 depends_on: db: condition: service_healthy broker: condition: service_healthy gotenberg: condition: service_started tika: condition: service_started container_name: '{{ INSTANCE_CODE }}' ports: - '{{ PORT_HTTP }}:8000' networks: - internal - agz-proxy-network networks: internal: driver: bridge agz-proxy-network: external: true

#!/bin/bash set -euo pipefail cd "$SERVICE_PATH" # Dump consistente de PostgreSQL (servicio en marcha) → $BACKUP_DATA_DIR. # Los documentos (media) y la data de la app los archiva Steer desde los volúmenes. docker compose exec -T db sh -c 'pg_dump -U "${POSTGRES_USER:-paperless}" -d "${POSTGRES_DB:-paperless}" --no-owner -Fc' \ > "$BACKUP_DATA_DIR/db.dump" echo "pg_dump OK ($(wc -c < "$BACKUP_DATA_DIR/db.dump") bytes)"

#!/bin/bash set -euo pipefail cd "$SERVICE_PATH" # Levanta solo la DB, espera readiness y restaura el dump. docker compose up -d db for i in $(seq 1 30); do docker compose exec -T db sh -c 'pg_isready -U "${POSTGRES_USER:-paperless}"' && break sleep 2 done docker compose exec -T db sh -c 'pg_restore -U "${POSTGRES_USER:-paperless}" -d "${POSTGRES_DB:-paperless}" --clean --if-exists --no-owner' \ < "$RESTORE_DATA_DIR/db.dump" # Verificación: la DB no quedó vacía (sh -c con dobles comillas; $VAR del contenedor con \$) N=$(docker compose exec -T db sh -c "psql -U \${POSTGRES_USER:-paperless} -d \${POSTGRES_DB:-paperless} -tAc \"SELECT count(*) FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_schema='public'\"") echo "tablas restauradas: $N" test "$N" -gt 0
PostgreSQL role that Paperless-ngx uses to connect to its database.
Name of the PostgreSQL database that stores document metadata.
Django secret key used to sign sessions and tokens; keep it private.
Login of the superuser created on first start.
Password for the initial administrator account.
Email address of the initial administrator account.
Tesseract OCR language code(s), e.g. eng or spa+eng.
Time zone used for dates and scheduled tasks (e.g. America/Argentina/Cordoba).
